sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ تُرَتِّبُ أَغْرَاضَ الْبَيْتِ حِينَ وَجَدَتْ صُنْدُوقًا قَدِيمًا فِي الْمَخْزَنِ.
sentences.translation: Žena je slagala stvari u kući kada je u ostavi pronašla staru škrinju.
sentences.translationEn: A woman was tidying the house when she found an old trunk in the storage room.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَتْهُ فَوَجَدَتْ فِيهِ رَسَائِلَ مَكْتُوبَةً بِخَطٍّ قَدِيمٍ.
sentences.translation: Otvorila je i unutra našla pisma ispisana starim rukopisom.
sentences.translationEn: She opened it and found letters written in old handwriting.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الرَّسَائِلُ مِنْ جَدِّهَا إِلَى جَدَّتِهَا، مَكْتُوبَةٌ مُنْذُ خَمْسِينَ سَنَةً.
sentences.translation: Bila su to pisma njenog djeda njenoj baki, napisana prije pedeset godina.
sentences.translationEn: They were letters from her grandfather to her grandmother, written fifty years ago.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَتْ كَلِمَاتٍ حُلْوَةً تَصِفُ الشَّوْقَ وَالْحُبَّ وَالاِنْتِظَارَ.
sentences.translation: Čitala je slatke riječi koje opisuju čežnju, ljubav i iščekivanje.
sentences.translationEn: She read sweet words describing longing, love, and waiting.

sentences.arabic: دَمَعَتْ عَيْنَاهَا وَهِيَ تُدْرِكُ أَنَّ الْكَلِمَاتِ تَبْقَى بَعْدَ أَصْحَابِهَا.
sentences.translation: Suze su joj potekle kada je shvatila da riječi ostaju i nakon onih koji su ih napisali.
sentences.translationEn: Tears filled her eyes as she realised that words outlive those who wrote them.
